name: Tabs
visual_summary: A Tabs component represents a tabbed interface where users can navigate between different sections or views, typically found in the header or sidebar.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: Tabs
Description: A Tabs component represents a tabbed interface where users can navigate between different sections or views, typically found in the header or sidebar.
Style: clean, responsive, adaptive
Interactions: clickable, tabbable, scrollable
Tags: nav, tabs, ui, component

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/Tabs/Tabs.tsx
// Tremor Tabs [v1.0.0]

import React from "react"
import * as TabsPrimitives from "@radix-ui/react-tabs"

import { cx } from "../../utils/cx"
import { focusRing } from "../../utils/focusRing"

const Tabs = (
  props: Omit<
    React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof TabsPrimitives.Root>,
    "orientation"
  >,
) => {
  return <TabsPrimitives.Root tremor-id="tremor-raw" {...props} />
}

Tabs.displayName = "Tabs"

type TabsListVariant = "line" | "solid"
